name: Brown Nugget Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Gradually add cocoa powder and salt, mixing continuously.
3. Beat egg yolks one at a time into the mixture.
4. Mix in vanilla extract.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the butter mixture alternately.
7. Stir in chopped California dried figs.
8. Arrange 3 slices of pound cake on a serving platter (about 3 x 9 inches).
9. Spread a layer of fig mixture over the cake slices.
10. Add another layer of cake, then more fig mixture.
11. Top with additional cake layers and fig mixture.
12. Frost any remaining sides with the fig mixture.
13. Chill the dessert for several hours before serving.
14. Whip cream until light and fluffy; spread on top of the cake.
15. Garnish with small chocolate candies.
